hooks.command: bash -lc 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; [ -z "$ROOT" ] && exit 0; exec uv run --no-project --quiet "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/scripts/alrah_hooks.py" --hook SessionStart'
